sources.notes: Ng et al. 2010 Nat Genet. Kabuki syndrome. MLL2 (now KMT2D per HGNC) is the sole gene of interest — 7/10 discovery probands, 26/43 validation probands had novel nonsense/frameshift mutations. No other causal genes identified or proposed in this paper (KDM6A/Kabuki-2 was not yet known in 2010). Expected_genes and comprehensive are both ['KMT2D']. Pipeline should resolve MLL2 → KMT2D via HGNC previous-symbol lookup. PMC2930028, OA confirmed.
